question.label: Team connection
question.name: How connected do you feel to the rest of the team right now?
question.description: Probes isolation or drift without naming it; one of the earliest signals of disengagement.

answer: I can feel the shift since the reorg, even though I am trying to keep things stable for the team.

assessment.note: She acknowledges a real post-reorg shift while still trying to hold stability for the team, suggesting mild disconnection and strain.

new_queue.label: Reorg shift
new_queue.name: You mentioned 'the shift since the reorg' — what feels most different now?

new_queue.label: Arrival context
new_queue.name: What's been most on your mind at work lately?

new_queue.label: Open invitation
new_queue.name: Is there anything on your mind that we haven't made space to talk about?

new_queue.label: Load pressure
new_queue.name: What part of your current load is hardest to keep in balance?

new_queue.label: Support gap
new_queue.name: Where would a bit more support make the biggest difference right now?

new_queue.label: Next step
new_queue.name: What's the first concrete thing you want to have changed by our next conversation?

history.answer_excerpt: I can feel the shift since the reorg, even though I am trying to keep things stable for the team.
I can feel the shift since the reorg, even though I am trying to keep things stable for the team.
